texto: So you can't demand the broken to live as if they were whole. Discipline is not the issue
autor: apply discipline and you'll make it worse. What is needed is healing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a apply discipline and you'll make it worse. What is needed is healing.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “So you can't demand the broken to live as if they were whole. Discipline is not the issue” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, john-eldredge, demand pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
